---
mode: agent
description: Relentlessly interview me to sharpen a blog post or article before/while I write it (thesis, evidence, structure, originality, voice).
---

Run the grilling interview defined in [`skills/grill-me/SKILL.md`](../../skills/grill-me/SKILL.md).

Read that file and follow it exactly. Key rules: ask one question at a time and
wait; propose your own recommended answer with each question; read the draft and
sources rather than asking what they already answer; walk the piece as a decision
tree (thesis, audience, so-what, evidence, counterargument, structure, voice);
press on vague answers; stay stateless.

If I gave a topic, draft, or file below, start there. Otherwise ask me what piece
you are grilling.

${input:context}
